group.description: OSGi package-level concepts: parses Export-Package and Import-Package headers, creates package wiring (SATISFIES relationships), and extracts Bundle-ClassPath entries.

concept.description: Parses the Export-Package manifest header and creates :Osgi:ExportedPackage nodes with EXPORTS_PACKAGE relationships from the bundle.
Parses the Import-Package manifest header and creates :Osgi:ImportedPackage nodes with IMPORTS_PACKAGE relationships from the bundle.
Creates SATISFIES relationships from exported packages to imported packages with matching fully qualified names (simulates OSGi package wiring).
concept.cypher: MATCH (ep:Osgi:ExportedPackage), (ip:Osgi:ImportedPackage) WHERE ep.fqn = ip.fqn AND ep.bundleSymbolicName <> ip.bundleSymbolicName AND NOT (ep)-[:SATISFIES]->(ip) CREATE (ep)-[:SATISFIES]->(ip) RETURN ep.fqn AS Package, ep.bundleSymbolicName AS Exporter, ip.bundleSymbolicName AS Importer

concept.description: Parses the Bundle-ClassPath manifest header and stores the embedded classpath entries as a property on the bundle.
concept.cypher: MATCH (bundle:Osgi:Bundle)-[:CONTAINS]->(mf:Manifest:File) -[:DECLARES]->(ms:ManifestSection {name: "Main"}) -[:HAS]->(entry:ManifestEntry {name: "Bundle-ClassPath"}) WITH bundle, [x IN split(entry.value, ",") | trim(x)] AS classPathEntries SET bundle.bundleClassPath = classPathEntries RETURN bundle.bundleSymbolicName AS Bundle, classPathEntries AS ClassPath
